title: Move Towards Target Behavior
description: Allows mob to move towards its current target.

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description:
Defines the radius in blocks that the mob tries to be from the target. A value of 0 means it tries to occupy the same block as the target

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 32

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
